name: lily-design-system-html-helpers
description: Lily Design System - HTML (web component) helpers catalog (dev/test harness)

scripts.build: for d in lily-design-system-html-theme-select lily-design-system-html-locale-select lily-design-system-html-text-size-select lily-design-system-html-share-button; do tsup "$d/index.ts" --format esm --dts --out-dir "$d/dist" || exit 1; done

author: joel@joelparkerhenderson.com
